description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a matte black finish, a prominent detachable box magazine, and a collapsible stock for adjustable length. The upper receiver is equipped with a full-length Picatinny rail, allowing for the attachment of various optics or accessories. The handguard is ribbed for improved grip and may support additional attachments. The barrel is of standard length and ends with a flash hider, enhancing control during firing. The pistol grip is ergonomically shaped for comfort and control. Iron sights are present, with the front sight post visible at the muzzle and a rear sight integrated into the rail.
description: A modern black tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, detachable magazine, Picatinny rail, and iron sights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, collapsible stock, detachable magazine, and Picatinny rail.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow barrel, front sight post, and flash hider.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, stock, and upper rail, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Rear-on view showing the stock's end and the alignment of the upper rail and barrel.
